MuseumMysteryPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_15_Payout6_4: After the payout of every round is made, all winning symbols will explode allowing the symbols above them to cascade down for a new round.
MuseumMysteryPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_16_Payout6_5: Additional winning combination will be tallied in every round until no more winning combination can be tallied.
MuseumMysteryPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_18_Payout1_1: Each Mystery symbol will occupy 2 symbols' spaces and each of these symbols will represent as a single symbol during payout calculations.
MuseumMysteryPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_19_Payout1_2: Wild symbol substitutes for all symbols except Scatter symbol.
MuseumMysteryPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule1_20_Payout1_3: Wild symbol appears on reels 2, 3, 4 and 5 only.
MuseumMysteryPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule2_1_Payout2_1: During any round, Mystery symbol with a randomly selected symbol inside (other than Scatter symbol) and x2 multiplier may appear in reel 2, 3 and/or 4.
MuseumMysteryPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule2_2_Payout2_2: The Mystery symbol will remain on the reel until the end of spin and reveal a randomly selected symbol (other than Scatter symbol) after being involved in a win.
MuseumMysteryPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule2_3_Payout2_3: If 1 or more Mystery symbols are involved in a win, the win in that round will be multiplied by the total multiplier from the Mystery symbol(s) that is involved in a win.
MuseumMysteryPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule2_4_Payout2_4: After wins are paid, the total multiplier will remain at the bottom of the reels and subsequent winning Mystery symbol(s) will increase the total multiplier until the end of the spin.
MuseumMysteryPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule2_5_Payout2_5: If 1 or more Mystery symbols are involved in a win and there is an existing total multiplier, the win in that round will be multiplied by the total multiplier in addition to the multipliers from the Mystery symbol(s) that is involved in the win.
MuseumMysteryPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule3_1_Payout3_1: 3 Scatter symbols appearing anywhere will award 3 times of the bet amount and trigger the Free Spins Feature with 10 free spins. Each additional Scatter symbol will award 2 times of the bet amount.
MuseumMysteryPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule3_2_Payout3_2: At the start of every free spin, a Mystery symbol is added to a random position in reel 2, 3 or 4.
MuseumMysteryPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule3_3_Payout3_3: At the 10th free spin where 9 Mystery symbols has occupied all positions in reel 2, 3 and 4, no more Mystery symbols will be added to the reel.
MuseumMysteryPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule3_4_Payout3_4: The collected multipliers from winning Mystery symbol(s) will remain until the end of the Free Spins Feature.
MuseumMysteryPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule3_5_Payout3_5: Scatter symbol does not appear during Free Spins Feature.
MuseumMysteryPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule4_1_Payout4_1: The maximum win amount is %{5000}x of the bet amount.
MuseumMysteryPayoutAndRulesShared.Rule4_2_Payout4_2: If the total win in the main game or the Free Spins Feature reaches %{5000}x of the bet amount, the spin ends.

MuseumMysteryRule.Rule1_1: Museum Mystery is a 5-reels (4 rows in reel 1 and 5, 6 rows in reels 2, 3 and 4) video slot featuring Mystery symbol with x2 Multiplier.
MuseumMysteryRule.Rule1_2: The game is played with 20 base bet for %{432} ways - %{3456} ways, bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
MuseumMysteryRule.Rule1_21: Free Spins Feature is played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the Free Spins Feature.
